content: Implement PIRLS solver in optimcore crate for mixed effects estimation
Complete Lmer::fit() method implementation (replace todo!() placeholders)
Create Oracle tests against lme4 for random intercept models
Implement memory usage benchmarks (target ≤50% of lme4)
Implement performance benchmarks (target ≥2x speed vs lme4)
Extend formula parser for (1|group) random effects syntax
